meta.title: Pablo Koll | Software Developer
meta.description: Self-taught Software Developer with +4 years specializing in Backend & Full Stack Development. Node.js, TypeScript, Python, React. eCommerce platforms (Shopify, SFCC), API integrations, and scalable architectures across international markets.

hero.headline: Pablo Koll
hero.subtitle: Software Engineer & System Builder
hero.subline: // self-taught engineer who builds scalable systems and clean architectures. passionate about solving real problems with the right tools — from APIs and backend services to full-stack products. always learning, currently leveraging AI to move faster and build smarter.

items.description: Developed and maintained payment gateway integrations with Adyen, Redsys, and Cybersource. Developing order management, returns, and exchanges workflows across international markets. Implemented compliant billing systems across multiple countries. Participated in the implementation of a new Order Management System (OMS) integrated with the existing ecosystem. Coordinating with Cloud infrastructure and internal IT teams following Agile methodology with Atlassian tools (Jira). Working with Salesforce Commerce Cloud (SFCC) B2C platform, supporting millions of customers and processing over 10,000 daily orders.

Full Stack development in Shopify ecosystem. Integrating systems and adding functionalities using Shopify's GraphQL, REST, and StoreFront APIs. Implementing ERPs, CRMs, and web services integrations. Direct communication with clients to gather requirements and deliver solutions. Using AWS for hosting and deploying backend applications.

Self-managing projects from technical perspective with direct client communication. Developed and maintained backend for Abbott's multi-instance Magento eCommerce synchronization with Salesforce CRM across eight countries in Latin America. Created middleware in NestJS to orchestrate client systems. Applied design patterns and implemented OAuth2, JWT authentication. Implemented CI/CD pipelines on GitLab.

Collaborated closely with design and product teams creating interactive UIs. Worked on maintenance and development for Toyota's CMS using Laravel and PHP. Developed Toyota's Hino trucks landing page using VueJS. Prioritized SEO strategies and participated in code reviews.

items.name: Backend & Languages
items.description: Node.js, Express.js, NestJS, TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, C/C++

items.name: Databases & ORMs
items.description: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Prisma, Sequelize

items.name: DevOps & Infra
items.description: Docker, AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda), Git, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, Linux

items.name: Frontend & APIs
items.description: React, Next.js, Vue.js, Astro, Liquid, Tailwind, REST, GraphQL, SOAP, Webhooks

items.name: kit_customization_widget
items.description: Interactive widget for Shopify that lets customers personalize products in real time. Features dynamic filtering by multiple attributes, live inventory checks, and a canvas-based preview with curved text, custom fonts, and multi-color effects.

items.name: asset_image_scraper
items.description: Node.js/TypeScript service that renders personalized product images on a dynamic canvas via Puppeteer, captures the output as a screenshot, and serves it as an optimized image. Built as a headless scraper-style pipeline with browser pool management for concurrent requests and smart caching.

learning.title: Current Focus
learning.subtitle: // What I'm learning and working on

items.name: learning_golang
items.description: Diving into Go's concurrency patterns, goroutines, and channels. Building microservices to understand its performance benefits and simplicity for backend systems.

items.name: mastering_vim
items.description: Practicing VIM motions and keybindings to boost coding efficiency. Using Neovim as my daily driver with custom configurations and plugins for a powerful development workflow.

items.name: obsidian_notes
items.description: Using Obsidian for knowledge management and building a personal knowledge base. Creating interconnected notes, linking ideas, and maintaining a second brain for technical concepts and learnings.

items.name: ai_tools_mastery
items.description: Integrating AI-powered development tools into my workflow. Learning prompt engineering, using Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, and building AI agents to boost productivity and automate tasks.
